LandingPage.title: Clean streets. Clear accountability.
LandingPage.subtitle: Ward-level waste accountability for Madurai. Citizens report. Supervisors resolve. Admins monitors all in real-time.
LandingPage.featuresDesc: A complete waste accountability loop from citizen report to verified resolution.
LandingPage.featureSnapDesc: Citizens photograph waste issues with their phone. GPS coordinates are captured instantly.
LandingPage.featureGpsDesc: Every report is geotagged within 15km Madurai geofence using PostGIS validation.
LandingPage.featureProximityDesc: Supervisors must be within 100m of the incident location to submit clearance.
LandingPage.featureRealtimeDesc: Admin dashboard updates instantly via Realtime Websocket. Zero page refreshes.
LandingPage.featureHeatmapDesc: Identify waste hotspots across all 100 wards with interactive Leaflet heatmaps.
LandingPage.featureResponseDesc: Automatic response time computation from report to resolution. Full accountability.
LandingPage.impactDesc: See how citizen reports turn into action. These incidents were recently addressed by our rapid response teams.
LandingPage.flowStep1Desc: Open the app, snap a photo, and submit. GPS and device info are captured automatically. No login required.
LandingPage.flowStep2Desc: Supervisors see pending incidents. They must physically visit the spot and submit a clearance photo within 100m.
LandingPage.flowStep3Desc: Admins see real-time updates, heatmaps, response times, and ward-level analytics with before/after photos.
LandingPage.ctaDesc: CleanChain brings transparency to waste management in Madurai. Start reporting now - Zero Friction, Maximum Impact.

CitizenPage.demoOverrideDesc: Select a pilot ward directly to spoof GPS location for presentation.
CitizenPage.sevHighDesc: Batteries, medical, large mixed dumps (High Severity)
CitizenPage.descPlaceholder: e.g. Overflowing bin near the bus stop...
CitizenPage.disclaimer: By submitting, your GPS location and device info will be recorded for accountability.
CitizenPage.noReports: No reports yet. Switch to the Report tab and start making an impact!
CitizenPage.successDesc: Thank you for helping keep Madurai clean. Your report has been logged and will be addressed by our team.
CitizenPage.toastNoGeo: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
CitizenPage.toastZone: Out of Zone: Reports are currently limited to the Madurai municipal limits.
CitizenPage.toastGpsFail: Failed to get location. Please enable GPS and try again.
CitizenPage.toastFail: Something went wrong. Please try again.
